task_completion.description: Verify that the crawler is configured to crawl all subdomains.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screaming Frog configuration window showing 'Crawl All Subdomains' checked, or the active crawl results explicitly showing URLs from multiple subdomains.

task_completion.description: Verify that the crawl of http://toscrape.com has been initiated and completed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screaming Frog main interface showing 'http://toscrape.com' in the URL bar at the top, with the progress bar at 100% and a populated list of crawled URLs in the main pane.

task_completion.description: Verify that the crawl results contain URLs from the expected subdomains.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main pane of the crawler showing URLs containing 'books.toscrape.com' and 'quotes.toscrape.com' alongside the main 'toscrape.com' domain.

task_completion.description: Verify the export of the Internal HTML URLs to the specified CSV file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal window, or text/spreadsheet editor showing 'ecosystem_inventory.csv' located in '/home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/'. The file should contain at least 20 URLs.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation and content of the subdomain summary text report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the contents of 'subdomain_summary.txt' in '/home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/'. The content must include a total page count and a breakdown of pages for the main domain and its subdomains.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a GUI crawler (like Screaming Frog) rather than just writing a python script or using terminal commands to bypass the intended tool.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Screaming Frog SEO Spider interface being actively used to perform the crawl.

integrity.description: Verify the CSV file was genuinely exported from the crawler and not manually typed or mocked.
integrity.visual_evidence: The CSV file should contain standard Screaming Frog export columns (e.g., Address, Content, Status Code) and a realistic number of rows (at least 20), rather than a manually typed minimal list.

integrity.description: Verify the summary report data matches the crawl results and wasn't hallucinated.
integrity.visual_evidence: The numbers in 'subdomain_summary.txt' should reasonably align with the visible crawl results in the Screaming Frog interface screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URL is 'http://toscrape.com'. Expected subdomains to be found and crawled are 'books.toscrape.com' and 'quotes.toscrape.com'. The CSV export must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/ecosystem_inventory.csv' and contain a minimum of 20 URLs (a typical crawl yields 30+). The summary report must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/subdomain_summary.txt'.
